title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Axe India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Axe India in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
